requirements.description: Every validation-broker implementation child bead maps to committed code paths, test paths, docs or evidence paths, validation commands, close reason, and commit hash.

The checklist covers the contract, lease store, source adapters, admission policy, CLI, fault corpus, Doctor/runpack projection, no-mock E2E harness, stress budgets, operator docs, README freshness, source-boundary checks, pushed refs, and quality gates.
A passing gate may close the final gate and parent epic. A failing gate must emit follow-up Beads instead of optimistic closeout.
All heavy Cargo validation evidence must prove RCH execution, including focused validation-broker tests plus cargo check and clippy.
The closeout gate is evidence over Beads, git, docs, tests, RCH, Doctor, runpacks, Agent Mail health, and source artifacts. It does not replace those sources of truth.
The closeout gate must not make release-facing performance or strict drop-in claims unless the independent claim-integrity artifacts permit them.
